column1: Jeremy Pena leads the slate with strong consistency, recording a hit in nearly 80% of games and batting leadoff against Nathan Eovaldi, who has allowed limited hits but faces a tough test here. Oneil Cruz offers upside as Pittsburgh’s leadoff hitter with a favorable platoon matchup and a recent hot streak. Brandon Lowe and William Contreras also present reliable options, each benefiting from advantageous matchups and solid recent form.
